MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-09-2002 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-09-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Diane Wick, clerk-beth wilber, reporter-brenda Fields, 11:50AM, Dept. 611: Eustace De Saint Phalle appears for plaintiff, Daniel W. Winters appearing for defendant; Case settled, terms put on the record as follows: Defendant will pay the plaintiff $500,000.00 within 3 weeks; parties agree to standard release terms; once money is paid to defendant plaintiff will file a dismissal. Neither party was present but both counsel represent to the court that their clients had agreed to the terms as put on the record.
